I

Info - Interface in org.siprop.v2.core.messge
This interface holds the message about a packet.

InviteClientTransaction - Class in org.siprop.v2.stack.sip.transaction.impl
The state machine for INVITE Client Transaction
According to RFC3261 Figure 5: INVITE client transaction

Constructor.
InviteServerTransaction - Class in org.siprop.v2.stack.sip.transaction.impl
The state machine for INVITE Server Transaction
According to RFC3261 Figure 7: INVITE server transaction
